title: Firkrann
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the crystal|[[Firkrann (Jedi)|the Jedi]]}}
[[File:Firkrann.png|thumb|right|150px|Firkrann]]
'''Firkrann''' crystals were a comparatively heavy [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystal]] mined on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rafa V]]. The crystal imparts an electrical charge to the weapon that contains it making the saber especially devastating to [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. They were noted to be used specifically by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lords of the Sith]].

==History==
When [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] entered the tomb of the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Tulak Hord]], he found a Firkrann crystal that may have been used by Hord in his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

==Behind the scenes==
This [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] is used in ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'' as a [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystal]] that sometimes infuses the [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] with [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]].
